data.body:
## Review-bot comment text (change 121) — recorded for AC3

Change: https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/121 (author JoeOakhartNava, acct 1000007)
Final vote: LLM-Review+1 (patchset 4); submit-requirement LLM-Review SATISFIED, 0 unresolved -> MERGED
-> Gerrit main a6f690de -> replicated to GitHub main after the WS7 deploy-key-only lock.

--- verbatim review-bot messages ---
PATCHSET 1:
Patch Set 1: LLM-Review+1

rebar code review: 3 finding(s), 0 at/above the blocking threshold.
- [medium] (code-quality) CONTRIBUTING.md §1b instructs installing the Gerrit `commit-msg` hook directly into `.git/hooks/commit-msg`, but the same setup section then tells contributors to run `make install`, which (per docs/local-dev-env.md and Makefile `hooks`)…
- [low] (code-quality) README.md now contains two adjacent, differently-framed descriptions of the same Gerrit feature: the new note (lines 234–236) asserts GitHub IS a read-only mirror and `main` only advances via Gerrit for this repo, while the pre-existing …
- [low] (code-quality) CLAUDE.md's short-version step 1 gives the concrete Ger

FINAL (PATCHSET 4):
Patch Set 4: LLM-Review+1

rebar code review: 1 finding(s), 0 at/above the blocking threshold.
- [low] (code-quality) The §2c table and §4 troubleshooting advise re-pushing 'the same commit' to re-trigger a coverage-gap (infra) review, but Gerrit normally rejects an unchanged re-push with 'no new changes to commit' (a new patchset requires a content or …
